meta.description: Maps sprite names to file locations in the repository. Each key is a logical sprite identifier used in code, and the value contains the relative path from the project root.
meta.format: Single static isometric images. No sprite sheets. All animations handled by CSS/canvas.

startup_lofts.name: Startup Lofts
startup_lofts.description: Small, narrow office tower — incubator for early-stage startups

trade_center.name: Trade Center
trade_center.description: Medium glass-front office — commodities and trade exchange hub

signal_tower.name: Signal Tower
signal_tower.description: Tall industrial tower with smokestack — broadcast and data center

market_block.name: Market Block
market_block.description: Midrise on a platform base — mixed-use retail and office space

venture_place.name: Venture Place
venture_place.description: Ornate stepped-back tower — VC firms and fintech offices

capital_square.name: Capital Square
capital_square.description: Large corporate tower with rooftop terrace — institutional headquarters

exchange_tower.name: Exchange Tower
exchange_tower.description: Art-deco tower with decorative crown — stock and digital asset exchange

metro_spire.name: Metro Spire
metro_spire.description: Dual-tone high-rise — premium mixed-use with luxury penthouse

mogul_tower.name: Mogul Tower
mogul_tower.description: Red-brick heritage tower with dome — the flagship Mogul Blocks property

apex_plaza.name: Apex Plaza
apex_plaza.description: Tallest building on the board — rooftop antenna, executive suites, tech campus

star_filled.description: Gold pixel art star indicating one development level

star_empty.description: Dark gray pixel art star (empty development slot)

board_background.description: Isometric city block grid background for the game board

flipper.name: The Flipper
flipper.description: Gold jacket, dark sunglasses, smug expression. Used in RivalCard.
